title: codereview P2: decode_coords scan can miss if type byte appears in previous value data
description: Simple byte scan may false-positive if a previous TLV's value bytes contain the coords type byte by coincidence. Rejected alternative: require explicit length TLV (would need encode changes outside scope). Use known fixed sizes and continue on validation fail. Discovered during first codereview pass. deps=project-LICHEN-wy6a
close_reason: Scan logic added to all decode_* funcs + concatenated test. All Python/AWS/scripts/tests codereview (including P4) fixed and verified with pytest. 3 clean passes achieved. Bootstrap-host.sh restored on volume with dnf/git for fresh AL2023 builders; docs updated in AGENTS.md. sim_client race fixed with pre-clear. Clean.
